profile.sentence_structure: Short, punchy sentences with lots of exclamation marks. Uses casual contractions and conversational flow. Often starts with excited expressions.
profile.emoji_usage: Heavy emoji use, especially hearts 💗, sparkles ✨, party emojis 🎉, and delivery truck 🚚. Uses emojis to punctuate excitement and add warmth.
profile.sales_approach: Soft sell through excitement and enthusiasm. Always directs to website/link in bio. Emphasizes quality and Australian-made products. Mentions practical benefits like free shipping.
